title: Alberta Wins Silver at the Canadian Master’s Team Squash Championships

content:
Congratulations to Team Alberta who won silver at last weekend’s Canadian Master’s Team Squash Championships. The team included ESC members Julie Multamaki and John de Vries, as well as RG head pro Pete Goodings. Julie won her match in the women’s #2 spot 3-2 in a 5 game thriller, and John won his match 3-0 in the men’s #3 spot.

A full report is available on the Squash Canada website.

Streams of the event can be found in the video below.

We are less than a month away from the Canadian Women’s Team Squash Championships held this year at the ESC February 15-17. Tickets are on sale now for $15 for a day pass or $30 for a weekend pass, or watch for free by volunteering.
